text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — honest errors, dev earnings, and automated payouts.

60 PRs merged this week.

→ HONEST ERRORS
we finally stopped blaming our servers for your bad requests. upstream user-input errors are now properly classified as 4xx instead of a panic 500. we also surface actual fetch errors when your image URL fails, rather than just returning a helpful empty bracket.

→ THE DASHBOARD
shipped a developer earnings dashboard so you can track what your apps are generating. we also added auto top-up because manual billing is a solved problem we were ignoring.

→ AUTOMATED BOUNTIES
added community quest workflows. quest payouts now run automatically based on github IDs. you merge code, you get paid. no humans required.

→ MODEL MUSICAL CHAIRS
added gpt-5.4-mini and elevenlabs flash v2.5. routed deepseek-v4-flash and qwen-vision via openrouter. added tooltips to the models list so you actually know what endpoint you are hitting.

→ GREENHOUSE EXPLOSION
24 new community apps merged into the ecosystem this week.

repo is public. docs at pollinations.ai

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools #BuildInPublic
